---
title: "Arbre généalogique"
---

```{r}
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
theme_set(theme_bw())

dat <- fread("Genealogie.csv")
dat <- dat |> 
  filter(Sosa>0)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'

cat("\n\n")

for (l in unique(dat$Line)) {
  # unique() checks levels
  dd.l = dat %>% filter(Line == l)  # select rows with each level of "Line"
  cat("\n\n#", l, "\n") # Create title
  
  for (i in 1:nrow(dd.l)) {
    dd = dd.l[i, ]
    
    if (dd$Other_names == "" | is.na(dd$Other_names)) {
      title = paste(paste0(dd$Sosa, "."), dd$Name, dd$Surname, sep = " ")
    } else {
      title = paste(paste0(dd$Sosa,"."),
                    dd$Name,
                    paste0("(",dd$Other_names,")"),
                    dd$Surname,
                    sep = " ")
    }
    cat(sprintf("\n\n## %s {#%d}\n\n", title, dd$Sosa))
    
    cat("\n**Naissance** le",
        dd$Birth_date,
        "à",
        dd$Birth_place,
        "\n")
    father.id = dd$Sosa * 2
    mother.id = father.id + 1
    parents = paste(paste0(father.id, "."), dat[dat$Sosa == father.id, "Name"][[1]], dat[dat$Sosa == father.id, "Surname"][[1]], "&", paste0(mother.id, "."), dat[dat$Sosa == mother.id, "Name"][[1]], dat[dat$Sosa == mother.id, "Surname"][[1]], sep = " ")
    
    # # Simple option with link but does not work with \t tabulator
    # cat(sprintf("\nParents %s [jump](#%d)\n\n", parents, 2*dd$Sosa))
    # Complicated HTML version
    cat(
      sprintf(
        "<div style='margin-left:2em;margin-bottom:2em;'><a href='#%d'><strong>Parents</strong></a> %s</div>\n\n",
        2 * dd$Sosa,
        parents
      )
    )
    cat("\n**Mariage** le",
        dd$Wedding_date,
        "à",
        dd$Wedding_place,
        "\n")
    
    if (!is.na(dd$Death_date) && dd$Death_date != "En vie") {
      cat("\n**Décès** le",
          dd$Death_date,
          "à",
          dd$Death_place,
          "\n")
    }
  }
}
cat("\n\n")


```
.
